text.tspan: (Debezium, AWS DMS, Maxwell, GoldenGate, Striim, Fivetran)
u2022 SQL Server: change tracking / CDC tables
u2022 already used internally for DB replication
u2022 connects to the DB as a 'replication client'
u2022 reads the replication log in real time
u2022 parses each change (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE) into a structured event
u2022 publishes to a message broker
u2022 tracks LSN/offset for resume after crash
Ordered per row (partition by primary key)
